About Us

A Legacy of Technical Leadership

Established on 10th October 1984 as an Automobile Research-oriented Institution under the Institute of Road Transport (IRT), Tamil Nadu State Transport Corporation. On 26 August 2021, the Higher Education Minister of Tamil Nadu announced its transfer to the Directorate of Technical Education (DoTE) and was renamed Government College of Engineering, Erode.

Situated 15 km from Erode Railway Station on NH-47, between Chithode and Bhavani, the Institute functions as the Zonal Headquarters for Zone-XI (Erode Zone) of Anna University — monitoring affiliated engineering colleges across Erode, Namakkal, Tiruppur and Salem districts.

Anna University Affiliated
AICTE Approved
DoTE Governed
PhD Programs
IIP Cell Active
Naan Mudhalvan
Zone-XI HQ
IPDC Centre
Startup Pre-Incubation

Zone-XI Anna University HQ

Overseeing engineering colleges affiliated to Anna University across Erode, Namakkal, Tiruppur & Salem districts — a mark of institutional authority.

1984EST.
🎯
Our Vision

Providing the impetus in the young minds through value based quality education and imparting sound knowledge, intellectual skills, good character and innovative ideas to develop potential leadership, professional excellence and enlightened services to the global society.

🚀
Our Mission

Government College of Engineering, Erode is committed to provide quality engineering education, foster research and development, evolve innovative applications of technology, encourage entrepreneurship and ultimately mould students with professional responsibility, social awareness and set them on the path to leadership for the betterment of our nation.

Academic Programs

Departments of Excellence

8 undergraduate and 2 postgraduate programs spanning core and emerging engineering disciplines.

⚙️
Mechanical Engineering
CAD/CAM, Mechatronics, IoT labs. Innovative Product Development Centre (IPDC). In-plant training at TAFE, TVS & Hyundai.
B.E · UG · 60 seats
📡
Electronics & Communication
Industry-aligned curriculum with advanced ECE labs. Graduates placed at Cadence Design Systems and top MNCs.
B.E · UG · 60 seats
⚡
Electrical & Electronics
24×7 computing access, digital library resources, and industry-synced practical training programs.
B.E · UG · 60 seats
💻
Computer Science & Engg
AI, ML, Data Science focused curriculum. M.E CSE postgraduate program with high-package industry placements.
B.E + M.E · UG & PG
🌐
Information Technology
Cloud computing, AI, Big Data & Cybersecurity. Preparing globally competitive IT professionals for the industry.
B.Tech · UG · 60 seats
🏗️
Civil Engineering
FEA, Structural Dynamics, STAAD Pro labs. M.E Structural Engineering PG program for advanced studies.
B.E + M.E · UG & PG
🚗
Automobile Engineering
The founding discipline of IRTT. A proud legacy of automotive research and engineering innovation.
B.E · UG · 60 seats
📊
CSE (Data Science)
Brand new program from 2025–26 academic year. 60-seat intake bridging AI with real-world data challenges.
B.E · New 2025–26
Facilities

World-Class Campus Infrastructure

A 200-acre green campus equipped with every modern amenity to nurture learning, research, sports, and holistic student development.

🔬
Laboratories
State-of-the-art labs across all departments.
  • CAD/CAM & Mechatronics Labs
  • Innovative Product Development Centre (IPDC)
  • FEA & STAAD Pro Structural Labs
  • Advanced ECE & VLSI Labs
  • AI / ML Computing Labs
📖
Library & Digital Resources
Rich academic library with digital access round the clock.
  • Extensive print & e-journal collection
  • 24×7 digital library access
  • Online databases & research portals
  • E-book & NPTEL access
🏠
Hostel Facilities
Separate hostel blocks for boys and girls with all amenities.
  • Boys & Girls hostels on campus
  • Hygienic mess & dining facilities
  • 24-hour security & surveillance
  • Wi-Fi enabled hostel premises
🏟️
Sports & Recreation
Expansive sports facilities across the 200-acre campus.
  • Cricket, Football & Athletics grounds
  • Indoor sports & gymnasium
  • Basketball & Volleyball courts
  • NSS & NCC programs
🌐
IT Infrastructure
High-speed internet and modern computing facilities.
  • High-speed broadband internet campus-wide
  • Wi-Fi enabled classrooms & labs
  • Smart classrooms with LCD projectors
  • ERP-based college management system
🚌
Transport & Location
Well-connected campus with dedicated bus routes.
  • 15 km from Erode Railway Station (NH-47)
  • Between Chithode & Bhavani
  • College bus routes to all major areas
  • Nearby banking & ATM facilities

Campus Life

Events & Campus Activities

A vibrant campus calendar full of technical fests, cultural events, sports, alumni meets, and research activities — life at GCE Erode goes beyond classrooms.

🔬
Research & Consultancy
Funded projects from DST, AICTE, DRDO, TNSCST. Active consultancy with industries. IPDC for student innovations.
🤝
Industrial Collaboration
MoUs with TAFE, TVS, WABCO, SIMPSON, Hyundai and more. In-plant training, live projects and campus drives.
🎭
Clubs & Societies
Literary, cultural, technical and sports clubs. NSS, NCC, Green Sodality Club, AECE and departmental associations.
Jul 2025
2000 Batch Silver Jubilee Meet
Grand alumni reunion celebrating 25 years of the graduating batch of 2000 with cultural events and networking.
📅 July 12, 2025

Placement Process

01
Pre-Placement Training

Aptitude, communication and technical skill training for all final-year students through the dedicated TP Cell.

02
Industry-Institute Partnership (IIP)

On/off-campus courses on latest technology through active IIP Cell, with in-plant training at top industries.

03
Campus Drives

Regular on-campus recruitment drives with 100+ companies visiting every academic year.

04
Higher Studies Guidance

Dedicated counselling for GATE, GRE, TOEFL and MBA entrance examinations.

05
Naan Mudhalvan

Tamil Nadu Government's flagship skill development program integrated into the curriculum.

Committees

Governing Bodies & Cells

Structured committees and student bodies ensure holistic development, institutional governance, and a vibrant campus culture.

⚖️
Anti-Ragging Committee
Ensures a safe, ragging-free campus. Confidential helpline: 1800-180-5522 (Toll Free).
View Committee →
👩‍💼
Internal Complaints Committee (ICC)
Addresses gender-related grievances and ensures a safe, respectful environment for all students and staff.
View Committee →
🌱
NSS — National Service Scheme
Active NSS unit conducting community service, blood donation camps, cleanliness drives, and awareness programs.
🎖️
NCC — National Cadet Corps
NCC unit developing discipline, leadership and patriotism among students through military training activities.
🏆
Sports Committee
Organises inter-collegiate tournaments, annual sports day, and promotes fitness and team spirit across campus.
💡
IPDC — Innovation Cell
Innovative Product Development Centre promoting student entrepreneurship, patents, and prototype development.
Visit IPDC →
📋
IQAC — Quality Assurance
Monitors academic quality, faculty development and institutional performance aligned with NAAC & NBA standards.
View Committee →
🤝
IIP Cell
Industry-Institute Partnership Cell facilitating MoUs, guest lectures, internships, and industrial consultancy projects.
View Committee →
📚
Student Counselling
Student counselling committee supporting academic and personal development of every student.
View Committee →
🔬
R&D Committee
Research and Development committee fostering funded research, consultancy, and innovation across departments.
View Committee →
🏠
Hostel & Mess Committee
Manages PG Hostel, Boys Hostel and Girls Hostel facilities ensuring quality, hygiene and student welfare.
View Committee →
📣
Student Council
Elected student representatives managing cultural events, tech-fests, student welfare initiatives and inter-college activities.
AICTE

AICTE Approvals & Compliance

Government College of Engineering, Erode is duly approved by the All India Council for Technical Education (AICTE), New Delhi — the statutory body for technical education in India.

📄

AICTE Approval Letter 2025–26

Annual approval granted by AICTE, New Delhi confirming the institution's eligibility to offer approved UG and PG programs.

View Document →
🏫

Institution Details

Permanent ID, Institute Code, and all regulatory information as registered with AICTE portal. All programs are AICTE approved.

AICTE Portal →
📋

Mandatory Disclosures

Faculty details, infrastructure, financial statements, and all mandatory disclosures as required by AICTE regulations.

View Disclosures →
🔍

Grievance Redressal

AICTE Grievance Portal registration and Student/Faculty/Parent Grievance Registration as per AICTE norms.

Register Grievance →
NIRF Ranking

National Institutional Rankings

The National Institutional Ranking Framework (NIRF) is the methodology adopted by the Ministry of Education, Government of India to rank institutions of higher education. GCE Erode participates in NIRF rankings across multiple categories.

Engineering Category
Ranked
Participating in NIRF Engineering rankings. Annual submission of data covering Teaching-Learning & Resources, Research, Graduation Outcomes, Outreach & Inclusivity, and Perception.
NIRF Parameters
5 Pillars
Teaching-Learning & Resources · Research & Professional Practice · Graduation Outcomes · Outreach & Inclusivity · Perception — all evaluated annually.
Transparency Portal
Open
All submitted NIRF data is publicly accessible on the official NIRF portal. GCE Erode is committed to transparency, accountability and continuous institutional improvement.
🔗

Official NIRF Data

For the most current ranking data and detailed parameter scores, visit the official NIRF website at nirfindia.org and search for Government College of Engineering, Erode.

NIRF Portal →
Exam Cell

Examinations & Results

The Examination Cell manages all aspects of internal and university examinations, results, certificates, and academic records for all students.

Academic Calendar

Odd Semester (July – November)

Classes begin July. Internal Assessment Tests in September & October. End-semester exams in November.

Even Semester (January – May)

Classes resume January. Internal tests in March & April. End-semester university exams in May.

Internal Assessment

Two Cycle Tests per semester. Average of best performances. Minimum 75% attendance mandatory for exam eligibility.

Anna University Exams

Theory and practical examinations conducted as per Anna University, Chennai schedule and guidelines.

Results & Certificates

Results declared on Anna University portal. Original degree certificates issued by Anna University, Chennai.

Thousands of GCE Erode alumni are making their mark across industries worldwide — from top MNCs and research labs to entrepreneurship and public service.

Batch of Engineers
